title: Apple TV 4K (3rd Gen) 128GB $246 (RRP $399) Delivered @ Amazon AU
body:
Deal: Apple TV 4K (3rd Gen) 128GB $246 (RRP $399) Delivered @ Amazon AU

[nrodg11] For anyone who cares this doesn't support Dolby Vision Profile 7.
[Fuzor] I didnt know there were even profiles. Wikipedia shows it has profile 5. Is that not enough?
[TsundereGuy] I didn't even know there was a profile 6
[sinners007] It's a good deal given the new ridiculous $399 price, but I'd rather buy 4 Google Streamers at that price.
[rfc850] I bit the bullet, haven't tried the Streamer but I've had a Xiaomi MiBox and a Chromecast 4K. They always start off good but end up laggy after a while.
[sinners007] I've owned this Apple TV and the Google Streamer. Both great devices at their respective price-points, pre this joke of a price rise. Apple TV was often $200-$240 & the Google Streamer is currently $109. Also have the MiBox gen 3 ($75) & that's an awesome device for the price.
I think at $399 it's going to be a hard sell.
[bunnybash] The ad free interface of the Apple TV makes it worthwhile for me. The Google devices just spamming ads on the Home Screen drives me bonkers. The ATV interface is so much nicer to interact with.
[AJbargains] https://buyersguide.macrumors.com/#Apple_TV
Probably a sign that a new model is coming out soon.
[rfc850] If this has just gone up to $399, can only imagine how much the new model will be.
[He-Mania] I know - crazy right. Apple taking full advantage blaming storage prices
[hen dawg] It's apparently ready to release except for 'Apple Intelligence'. It's a crazy price jump to $400. Over double what it was on sale for sometimes.
I was hanging on for the new model in case it did lossless audio but not interested at that price.
[rban945] It’ll probably happen but FYI Mac Rumors has been saying this for quite a while. The youtube video linked in that article is a year old
[He-Mania] September is the latest rumour. It's suspected AI will be the advantage of the new one - something I couldn't care less about
[Apostle0748] It's very tempting as I love a good deal but I've held out this long for a new one - I might as well keep going.
Here's hoping the new one has audio pass through and AV1 hardware support.
[Tea-Aholic] I was also going to wait but are you going to spend $399 on the new one?
[StuOS] 'Apple TV is finally getting HI-RES AUDIO…but there’s a catch'
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2OIUfs4wA_c
[neurofunky] FYI: https://www.macrumors.com/roundup/apple-tv/
new one seems coming soon
[Soldier] New one had been “coming soon”, and Apple “has them ready to launch” for the past 3 years
[Soldier] Umm when did this goto 399? I got it launch week for $249
[adb1984] I basically just use Google TV, how much better is Apple TV?
[CalmLemons] not by much. few years ago google tv was unusable but all the integrated android on TVs is half decent now. Apple TV is still heaps smoother.
[adb1984] Thank you, I have always found google pretty solid but I just dont have the point of comparison.
[He-Mania] I prefer it but only because I use and iPad and iPhone and like how snappy and user friendly it is. It's worth $250 but never $400
[He-Mania] Ooops - didn't see this when I posted my deal.
With a new Apple TV rumoured, I thought this was a chance to grab the outgoing model at a hefty discount. Apple will likely stop retailers selling the 3rd Gen as soon as the new one hits — this happened last time when I waited until launch. The rumoured AI benefits are moot to me anyway.
Also $5 off when using Mastercard - at least for me
[CalmLemons] ai features will be pretty pointless. every single other device is smashing us with ai.
they just need to improve voice recognition, still waiting 15 years for apple to do so.
[p3r514n] Great price, but useless product for those who sail the high seas.
[OGGazelle] A great product for self hosting playback
